_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
focal_document_element_description: Develop and Implement cybersecurity independent audit processes for application software/networks/systems and oversee ongoing independent audits to ensure that operational and Research and Design (R&D) processes and procedures are in compliance with organizational and mandatory cybersecurity requirements and accurately followed by Systems Administrators and other cybersecurity staff when performing their day-to-day activities.
reference_document_element_description: Monitor organizational compliance with data protection obligations, conduct internal audits of processing activities, maintain the register of processing activities, and report compliance posture to senior management and supervisory authorities as required.
comments: DCWF task intersects with WIDAI SP domain. SP-T-006 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: SP-T-001 (SP, cosine: 0.494), AG-T-009 (AG, cosine: 0.475).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark.
primary_method.significance: STS 6.3/10 (raw 0.626). Shared vocabulary: [activities, audits, compliance, organizational]. DCWF-only terms [accurately, administrators, application, audit, cybersecurity, d] vs WIDAI-only terms [authorities, conduct, data, internal, maintain, management] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.848 (P=0.832, R=0.864). R exceeds P by 0.031 — the WIDAI KSA's 31 words are well-captured by the DCWF element's 51 words, but the DCWF element contains broader scope not fully reflected in the matched WIDAI KSA.

nli_cross_encoder.significance: NLI: neutral-dominant (100.0%). "Develop and Implement cybersecurity independent audit processes for application" and "Monitor organizational compliance with data protection obligations, conduct inte" are related but neither implies nor contradicts the other. Standard result for cross-framework mapping where two independent frameworks describe overlapping competencies with independent vocabulary.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.507 < STS 0.626 (gap -0.119). Cross-attention finds deeper alignment than independent encoding. The relationship depends on cross-text reasoning — concept-level mapping between [accurately, administrators, application] and [authorities, conduct, data] that bi-encoders structurally cannot capture.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens).
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 11.5%. Shared tokens: [activities, audits, compliance, organizational]. DCWF-only: [accurately, administrators, application, audit, cybersecurity, d]. WIDAI-only: [authorities, conduct, data, internal, maintain, management].
